TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sinkam, title = Sinkam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sinkam} }

S.FORM: Sinkam Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Sinkam a niyaro', 126 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 431 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 379 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 52 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun80%, Amis4%, Puyuma0.5%, Saysiyat0.5%, Truku0.5%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sinkam itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u sinkam a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*.*%, sajsijat*.*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*.*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Sinkam Itiniay i Zhuoxi Cen no Hualien ko Sinkam a niyaro', 126 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 431 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 88% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 379 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 12% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 52 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun80%, Amis4%, Puyuma0.5%, Saysiyat0.5%, Truku0.5%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sinkam itiniaj i *ħo~u~uo~uxi ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u sinkam a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, amis*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*.*%, sajsijat*.*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*.*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
